name: Jiangshan Oupai Door Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangshan Oupai Door Industry Co., Ltd engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of wooden doors in China. It offers wooden doors for bedrooms, kitchen and bath rooms, and living rooms, as well as provides wooden door accessories. The company markets its products through approximately 2,000 terminal stores. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Africa, and internationally. The company is based in Jiangshan, China.
